# Vježba 12 — Impuls 2

## Fizikalni uvod: Dinamika pokretnih lopatica (Peltonova turbina)

Zakon o očuvanju količine gibanja na pokretnim tijelima temelj je rada većine hidrauličkih i vjetroturbina. Ključna razlika u odnosu na nepomične plohe je u tome što sila više ne ovisi isključivo o apsolutnoj brzini mlaza $v$, već o **relativnoj brzini** ($v - w$) kojom mlaz sustiže lopaticu (žlicu) koja se kreće obodnom brzinom $w$.

Kod Peltonovih turbina, mlaz vode udara u žlice koje se gibaju. Snaga $P$ koju turbina predaje vratilu direktno ovisi o toj relativnoj brzini, kutu skretanja mlaza te brzini gibanja samog rotora:
$$P = F \cdot w = \dot{m} (v - w) (1 - \cos\beta) \cdot w$$

Gdje parametri predstavljaju:
*   $v$ [m/s] – apsolutna brzina mlaza koji izlazi iz sapnice.
*   $w$ [m/s] – obodna brzina žlice definirana kao $r \cdot \omega$, gdje je $r$ radijus rotora.
*   $\beta$ [°] – kut pod kojim žlica zakreće mlaz. Inženjerski optimum iznosi oko 165° kako bi se izbjeglo ometanje sljedeće žlice uz zadržavanje maksimalnog potiska.

**Fizikalni uvid i "Zlatno pravilo":** 
Iako sila na žlicu opada linearno s povećanjem njezine brzine (jer je relativni udar "slabiji"), snaga je produkt te sile i brzine gibanja. Analizom funkcije snage dolazimo do ključnog zaključka: maksimalna snaga i iskoristivost postižu se kada je obodna brzina žlice točno **polovica** brzine mlaza ($w = v/2$). U toj idealnoj točki, voda napušta žlicu s minimalnom preostalom kinetičkom energijom, predavši svoj maksimum impulsa rotoru turbine.

### Propulzija i mlazni potisak

Osim na turbine, zakon količine gibanja primjenjuje se i na **propulziju** (pogon). Kod mlaznih motora i raketa, potisak ($F_p$) nastaje kao reakcija na izbacivanje mase fluida (produkata izgaranja ili vode) velikom brzinom:
$$F_p = \dot{m} \cdot v_{iz}$$

Za razliku od turbina gdje oduzimamo energiju fluidu, kod propulzije koristimo energiju (kemijsku ili tlačnu) kako bismo fluidu predali impuls, a on uzvratio silom potiska na samo vozilo.

### Vektorska dekompozicija i statička ravnoteža

U složenim sustavima cjevovoda, sila hidrostatskog tlaka i sila promjene impulsa djeluju istovremeno. Ukupna rezultantna sila na element sustava (npr. koljeno ili prirubnicu) dobiva se vektorskim zbrojem:
1.  **Sile tlaka:** Djeluju na ulazni i izlazni presjek u smjeru prema unutrašnjosti kontrolnog volumena ($p \cdot A$).
2.  **Sile promjene impulsa:** Proizlaze iz skretanja struje fluida ($\dot{m} \cdot \Delta \vec{v}$).

Ispravno projektiranje oslonaca zahtijeva analizu ovih sila po x, y i z osima, osiguravajući da su reakcije u osloncima dovoljno jake da spriječe pomake sustava pod punim opterećenjem.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- NOVI WIDGET: Optimizacija Peltonove turbine -->
<div id="widget-pelton-opt" style="max-width: 1080px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-shell {
            border: 1px solid #dbe7f5;
            border-radius: 26px;
            padding: 28px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fbff 0%, #eef5ff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.6vw, 2.1rem);
            line-height: 1.05;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-subtitle {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 60ch;
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.96rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-badge {
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a, #1d4ed8);
            color: #eff6ff;
            min-width: 170px;
            box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18);
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-badge-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            opacity: 0.78;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-badge-value {
            margin-top: 6px;
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-note,
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-explainer {
            padding: 16px 18px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-note {
            background: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.35);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1e3a8a;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin: 18px 0 22px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-control {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            border-radius: 18px;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-control label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #1e293b;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-control span {
            color: #1d4ed8;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-stage {
            padding: 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            border-radius: 22px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-stage-head {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-stage-title {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-chip {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #0f172a;
            background: #dbeafe;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-cards {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-card {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-card-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: #64748b;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-card-value {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-explainer {
            margin-top: 18px;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border: 1px solid #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
        }
        @media (max-width: 720px) {
            #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-shell {
                padding: 20px;
            }
            #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-head {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #widget-pelton-opt .pelton-badge {
                min-width: 0;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="pelton-shell">
        <div class="pelton-head">
            <div>
                <h3 class="pelton-title">Peltonov optimum: gdje relativna brzina prestaje biti korisna</h3>
                <p class="pelton-subtitle">U vježbi 13 je uvodni Moody graf postao glavni vizualni kompas poglavlja. Ovdje istu ulogu preuzima široka Pelton scena: vidiš ulazni mlaz, relativni udar na žlicu, brzinu rotora i graf snage na istoj razini čitanja.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-badge">
                <div class="pelton-badge-label">Zlatno pravilo</div>
                <div class="pelton-badge-value">w = v/2</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pelton-note">
            <strong>Kako čitati vrh parabole:</strong> Kad povećavaš brzinu žlice <strong>w</strong>, relativna brzina udara <strong>v - w</strong> pada i sila slabi, ali snaga raste dokle god proizvod <strong>F · w</strong> još dobiva na vrijednosti. Zato se optimum ne nalazi ni na sporom ni na vrlo brzom rotoru, nego točno u ravnoteži između ta dva učinka.
        </div>
        
        <div class="pelton-controls">
            <div class="pelton-control">
                <label><span>Brzina mlaza v</span><strong><span id="v-val-pelton">50</span> m/s</strong></label>
                <input type="range" id="v-slider-pelton" min="20" max="80" value="50" step="1" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-control">
                <label><span>Brzina žlice w</span><strong><span id="w-val-pelton">10</span> m/s</strong></label>
                <input type="range" id="w-slider-pelton" min="0" max="80" value="10" step="1" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pelton-stage">
            <div class="pelton-stage-head">
                <div class="pelton-stage-title">Glavna scena prijenosa impulsa</div>
                <div class="pelton-chip" id="pelton-status-chip">Režim rada</div>
            </div>
            <canvas id="canvas-pelton-viz" width="960" height="360"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div class="pelton-stage">
            <div class="pelton-stage-head">
                <div class="pelton-stage-title">Krivulja snage P(w)</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; color: #7c2d12;">P = <span id="p-out-pelton">0</span> MW</div>
            </div>
            <canvas id="canvas-pelton-chart" width="960" height="320"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div class="pelton-cards">
            <div class="pelton-card">
                <div class="pelton-card-label">Relativna brzina</div>
                <div class="pelton-card-value" id="pelton-vrel-card">0.0 m/s</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-card">
                <div class="pelton-card-label">Sila na žlici</div>
                <div class="pelton-card-value" id="pelton-force-card">0 kN</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-card">
                <div class="pelton-card-label">Omjer w/v</div>
                <div class="pelton-card-value" id="pelton-ratio-card">0.00</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-card">
                <div class="pelton-card-label">Optimum w*</div>
                <div class="pelton-card-value" id="pelton-opt-card">0.0 m/s</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pelton-card">
                <div class="pelton-card-label">Odstupanje od optimuma</div>
                <div class="pelton-card-value" id="pelton-gap-card">0%</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pelton-explainer">
            <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="pelton-explainer"></span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cViz = document.getElementById('canvas-pelton-viz');
        const cChart = document.getElementById('canvas-pelton-chart');
        const ctxV = cViz.getContext('2d');
        const ctxC = cChart.getContext('2d');
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider-pelton');
        const wSl = document.getElementById('w-slider-pelton');
        const chip = document.getElementById('pelton-status-chip');
        const state = {
            v: 50,
            w: 10,
            vRel: 40,
            m: 150,
            beta: 165 * Math.PI / 180,
            force: 0,
            power: 0,
            ratio: 0,
            gap: 0,
            wOpt: 25,
            phase: 0
        };

        function classify(ratio) {
            if (Math.abs(ratio - 0.5) < 0.05) return { label: 'blizu optimuma', bg: '#dcfce7', color: '#166534' };
            if (ratio < 0.5) return { label: 'rotor prespor', bg: '#dbeafe', color: '#1d4ed8' };
            return { label: 'rotor prebrz', bg: '#fee2e2', color: '#b91c1c' };
        }

        function update() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const w = parseFloat(wSl.value);
            const vRel = Math.max(0, v - w);
            const F = state.m * vRel * (1 - Math.cos(state.beta));
            const P = state.m * vRel * w * (1 - Math.cos(state.beta)) / 1e6;
            const wOpt = v / 2;
            const ratio = w / v;
            const gap = Math.abs(w - wOpt) / wOpt;

            state.v = v;
            state.w = w;
            state.vRel = vRel;
            state.force = F;
            state.power = P;
            state.wOpt = wOpt;
            state.ratio = ratio;
            state.gap = gap;

            const status = classify(ratio);
            chip.textContent = status.label;
            chip.style.background = status.bg;
            chip.style.color = status.color;

            document.getElementById('v-val-pelton').textContent = v.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('w-val-pelton').textContent = w.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('p-out-pelton').textContent = P.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('pelton-vrel-card').textContent = vRel.toFixed(1) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('pelton-force-card').textContent = (F / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('pelton-ratio-card').textContent = ratio.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('pelton-opt-card').textContent = wOpt.toFixed(1) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('pelton-gap-card').textContent = (gap * 100).toFixed(0) + '%';
            document.getElementById('pelton-explainer').textContent = `Za mlaz ${v.toFixed(0)} m/s i brzinu žlice ${w.toFixed(0)} m/s relativna brzina pada na ${vRel.toFixed(1)} m/s. Tada sila na žlici iznosi oko ${(F / 1000).toFixed(1)} kN, a snaga ${P.toFixed(2)} MW. Omjer w/v = ${ratio.toFixed(2)}, pa je idealna radna točka i dalje oko w = ${wOpt.toFixed(1)} m/s.`;

            drawChart();
            drawViz();
        }

        function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            const headlen = 11;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
        }

        function drawEnergyBar(x, y, height, ratio, color, label, valueText) {
            ctxV.fillStyle = 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2)';
            ctxV.fillRect(x, y, 26, height);
            ctxV.fillStyle = color;
            ctxV.fillRect(x, y + height * (1 - ratio), 26, height * ratio);
            ctxV.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctxV.font = '700 13px Inter';
            ctxV.fillText(label, x - 6, y + height + 24);
            ctxV.font = '700 12px Inter';
            ctxV.fillText(valueText, x - 4, y - 10);
        }

        function drawViz() {
            const w = cViz.width;
            const h = cViz.height;
            ctxV.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

            const bg = ctxV.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
            bg.addColorStop(0, '#0f172a');
            bg.addColorStop(0.55, '#1e3a5f');
            bg.addColorStop(1, '#1d4ed8');
            ctxV.fillStyle = bg;
            ctxV.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

            ctxV.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
            for (let i = 0; i < 12; i += 1) {
                ctxV.fillRect(0, 36 + i * 24, w, 1);
            }

            const bucketX = 420 + state.w * 3.6;
            const nozzleX = 80;
            const centerY = 180;
            const incomingLen = Math.max(130, bucketX - nozzleX - 48);
            const deflectLen = 120 + state.vRel * 2.4;
            const bucketRadius = 52;
            const jetPulse = 8 * Math.sin(state.phase);

            ctxV.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.moveTo(nozzleX - 28, centerY - 24);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX + 24, centerY - 24);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX + 54, centerY - 14);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX + 54, centerY + 14);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX + 24, centerY + 24);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX - 28, centerY + 24);
            ctxV.closePath();
            ctxV.fill();

            const jet = ctxV.createLinearGradient(nozzleX + 18, 0, bucketX, 0);
            jet.addColorStop(0, '#93c5fd');
            jet.addColorStop(1, '#38bdf8');
            ctxV.strokeStyle = jet;
            ctxV.lineWidth = 22;
            ctxV.lineCap = 'round';
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.moveTo(nozzleX + 18, centerY);
            ctxV.lineTo(nozzleX + 18 + incomingLen, centerY);
            ctxV.stroke();

            ctxV.strokeStyle = '#f8fafc';
            ctxV.lineWidth = 10;
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.arc(bucketX, centerY, bucketRadius, -Math.PI / 2.1, Math.PI / 2.1);
            ctxV.stroke();

            ctxV.strokeStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.95)';
            ctxV.lineWidth = 12;
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.moveTo(bucketX - 6, centerY - bucketRadius + 16);
            ctxV.quadraticCurveTo(bucketX - 42, centerY - 96 - jetPulse * 0.3, bucketX - deflectLen, centerY - 104 - jetPulse);
            ctxV.stroke();
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.moveTo(bucketX - 6, centerY + bucketRadius - 16);
            ctxV.quadraticCurveTo(bucketX - 42, centerY + 96 + jetPulse * 0.3, bucketX - deflectLen, centerY + 104 + jetPulse);
            ctxV.stroke();

            ctxV.setLineDash([8, 8]);
            ctxV.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.28)';
            ctxV.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxV.beginPath();
            ctxV.moveTo(bucketX, 54);
            ctxV.lineTo(bucketX, 306);
            ctxV.stroke();
            ctxV.setLineDash([]);

            drawArrow(ctxV, nozzleX + 18, centerY - 46, nozzleX + 18 + Math.min(180, state.v * 3.2), centerY - 46, '#f8fafc');
            drawArrow(ctxV, bucketX + 18, centerY + 76, bucketX + 18 + Math.min(190, state.w * 4.2), centerY + 76, '#f97316');
            drawArrow(ctxV, bucketX + 48, centerY - 6, bucketX + 48 + Math.min(180, state.force / 180), centerY - 6, '#facc15');

            ctxV.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
            ctxV.font = '700 14px Inter';
            ctxV.fillText('ulazni mlaz v', nozzleX + 20, centerY - 58);
            ctxV.fillText('brzina rotora w', bucketX + 20, centerY + 96);
            ctxV.fillText('sila na žlicu F', bucketX + 52, centerY - 18);
            ctxV.fillStyle = '#93c5fd';
            ctxV.font = '700 15px Inter';
            ctxV.fillText('v - w = ' + state.vRel.toFixed(1) + ' m/s', bucketX - 112, centerY - 116);

            ctxV.fillStyle = 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.35)';
            ctxV.fillRect(738, 56, 150, 208);
            drawEnergyBar(760, 86, 150, Math.min(1, state.v / 80), '#38bdf8', 'v', state.v.toFixed(0));
            drawEnergyBar(810, 86, 150, Math.min(1, state.vRel / 80), '#facc15', 'v-w', state.vRel.toFixed(0));
            drawEnergyBar(860, 86, 150, Math.min(1, state.w / 80), '#f97316', 'w', state.w.toFixed(0));
        }

        function drawChart() {
            const v = state.v;
            const wCurrent = state.w;
            const m = state.m;
            const beta = state.beta;
            const wMax = Math.max(1, v);
            const pMax = Math.max(0.01, m * (v / 2) * (v / 2) * (1 - Math.cos(beta)) / 1e6);
            const left = 74;
            const right = cChart.width - 32;
            const top = 32;
            const bottom = cChart.height - 48;
            const plotW = right - left;
            const plotH = bottom - top;

            ctxC.clearRect(0, 0, cChart.width, cChart.height);
            const bg = ctxC.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, cChart.height);
            bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
            bg.addColorStop(1, '#f8fbff');
            ctxC.fillStyle = bg;
            ctxC.fillRect(0, 0, cChart.width, cChart.height);

            ctxC.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctxC.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i += 1) {
                const y = top + (plotH / 4) * i;
                ctxC.beginPath();
                ctxC.moveTo(left, y);
                ctxC.lineTo(right, y);
                ctxC.stroke();
                const value = pMax * (1 - i / 4);
                ctxC.fillStyle = '#64748b';
                ctxC.font = '12px Inter';
                ctxC.fillText(value.toFixed(2), 16, y + 4);
            }
            for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i += 1) {
                const x = left + (plotW / 4) * i;
                ctxC.beginPath();
                ctxC.moveTo(x, top);
                ctxC.lineTo(x, bottom);
                ctxC.stroke();
                const value = wMax * (i / 4);
                ctxC.fillStyle = '#64748b';
                ctxC.fillText(value.toFixed(0), x - 8, bottom + 22);
            }

            ctxC.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxC.lineWidth = 1.5;
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(left, bottom);
            ctxC.lineTo(right, bottom);
            ctxC.lineTo(right - 6, bottom - 4);
            ctxC.moveTo(right, bottom);
            ctxC.lineTo(right - 6, bottom + 4);
            ctxC.moveTo(left, bottom);
            ctxC.lineTo(left, top);
            ctxC.lineTo(left - 4, top + 6);
            ctxC.moveTo(left, top);
            ctxC.lineTo(left + 4, top + 6);
            ctxC.stroke();

            ctxC.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctxC.font = '700 13px Inter';
            ctxC.fillText('w [m/s]', right - 40, bottom + 38);
            ctxC.save();
            ctxC.translate(22, 90);
            ctxC.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
            ctxC.fillText('P [MW]', 0, 0);
            ctxC.restore();

            ctxC.setLineDash([6, 6]);
            ctxC.strokeStyle = '#16a34a';
            const xOpt = left + (state.wOpt / wMax) * plotW;
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(xOpt, top);
            ctxC.lineTo(xOpt, bottom);
            ctxC.stroke();
            ctxC.setLineDash([]);
            ctxC.fillStyle = '#166534';
            ctxC.font = '700 12px Inter';
            ctxC.fillText('optimum', xOpt - 24, top - 8);

            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.lineWidth = 4;
            const curve = ctxC.createLinearGradient(left, 0, right, 0);
            curve.addColorStop(0, '#38bdf8');
            curve.addColorStop(1, '#2563eb');
            ctxC.strokeStyle = curve;
            for (let w = 0; w <= wMax; w += 0.5) {
                const power = m * (v - w) * w * (1 - Math.cos(beta)) / 1e6;
                const px = left + (w / wMax) * plotW;
                const py = bottom - (power / pMax) * plotH;
                if (w === 0) ctxC.moveTo(px, py); else ctxC.lineTo(px, py);
            }
            ctxC.stroke();

            const curP = state.power;
            const cx = left + (wCurrent / wMax) * plotW;
            const cy = bottom - (curP / pMax) * plotH;
            ctxC.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.arc(cx, cy, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctxC.fill();

            ctxC.fillStyle = '#7c2d12';
            ctxC.font = '700 12px Inter';
            ctxC.fillText('trenutno', cx + 12, cy - 10);
            ctxC.fillText(curP.toFixed(2) + ' MW', cx + 12, cy + 10);
        }

        function animate() {
            state.phase += 0.08;
            drawViz();
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        vSl.oninput = wSl.oninput = update;
        update();
        animate();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak Z104 — Potisak satelita {.unnumbered}

Satelit u orbiti mase 5000 kg putuje konstantnom brzinom $v_0$. Da bi skrenuo s putanje, raketni pogon ispušta 100 kg ispušnih plinova relativnom brzinom 3000 m/s, u smjeru suprotnom od $v_0$, i to ravnomjerno tijekom 2 sekunde. Potrebno je odrediti ubrzanje satelita tijekom tog razdoblja, promjenu brzine satelita te silu potiska na satelit.

**Zadano:** $m_s=5000\,\text{kg}$, $m_g=100\,\text{kg}$, $v_i=3000\,\text{m/s}$, $\Delta t=2\,\text{s}$
**Odrediti:** $a_s$, $\Delta v$, $F_p$

**Rješenje:**
1. $F_p = \dot{m} v_i = 50 \cdot 3000 = \mathbf{150 \, \text{kN}}$.
2. $a_s = F_p / m_s = \mathbf{30 \, \text{m/s}^2}$.
3. $\Delta v = a_s \Delta t = \mathbf{60 \, \text{m/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Raketna jednadžba -->
<div id="v12-rocket-widget" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #f1f5f9; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🚀 Dinamika propulzije: Tsiolkovsky</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.35); border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #bae6fd; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati raketu:</strong> Ispušna brzina <strong>vᵢ</strong> daje koliko je "vrijedan" svaki kilogram goriva, ali ukupni dobitak brzine određuje tek logaritamski faktor <strong>ln(m₀/m_f)</strong>. Zato golemo povećanje omjera masa daje samo postupno veći <strong>Δv</strong>.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <!-- Svemir -->
        <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #1e293b 0%, #0f172a 100%); border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #334155; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="v12-rocket-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="v12-dv-display" style="position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #38bdf8; font-weight: bold; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.5);">
                Δv: 0 m/s
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kontrole -->
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #1e293b; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #334155;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #94a3b8;">Brzina plinova vᵢ: <span id="v12-v-vi" style="color:#38bdf8;">2500</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="v12-vi-slider" min="500" max="5000" step="100" value="2500" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #94a3b8;">Omjer masa m₀/m_f: <span id="v12-v-ratio" style="color:#38bdf8;">5.0</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="v12-ratio-slider" min="1.1" max="20" step="0.1" value="5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <button id="v12-launch-btn" style="padding: 15px; background: #38bdf8; color: #0f172a; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">LANSIRAJ / RESET</button>

            <div style="background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.1); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #38bdf8; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6;">
                <b>Fizika:</b> Δv ovisi logaritamski o promjeni mase. Za svaku dodatnu jedinicu brzine, potrebno je eksponencijalno više goriva.
                <code style="display:block; margin-top:10px; color:#38bdf8;">Δv = vᵢ · ln(m₀ / m_f)</code>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75); padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #334155; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 700;">ln(m₀/m_f)</div>
                    <div id="v12-log-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc;">0.00</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75); padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #334155; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 700;">Potrošeno gorivo</div>
                    <div id="v12-fuel-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc;">0.0%</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75); padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #334155; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 700;">Ukupni Δv</div>
                    <div id="v12-dv-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f8fafc;">0 m/s</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.35); border-radius: 12px; color: #fed7aa; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="v12-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v12-rocket-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const viS = document.getElementById('v12-vi-slider');
    const ratioS = document.getElementById('v12-ratio-slider');
    const launchBtn = document.getElementById('v12-launch-btn');
    const dvDisplay = document.getElementById('v12-dv-display');

    let stars = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) stars.push({x: Math.random()*550, y: Math.random()*400, s: Math.random()*2});

    let launching = false, progress = 0, currentDv = 0;

    function updateOutputs(totalDv) {
        const vi = parseFloat(viS.value);
        const ratio = parseFloat(ratioS.value);
        const logFactor = Math.log(ratio);
        const fuelFraction = (1 - 1 / ratio) * 100;

        document.getElementById('v12-v-vi').innerText = vi;
        document.getElementById('v12-v-ratio').innerText = ratio.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v12-log-card').textContent = logFactor.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('v12-fuel-card').textContent = fuelFraction.toFixed(1) + '%';
        document.getElementById('v12-dv-card').textContent = Math.round(totalDv) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('v12-explainer').textContent = `Za ispušnu brzinu ${vi.toFixed(0)} m/s i omjer masa ${ratio.toFixed(1)} logaritamski faktor iznosi ${logFactor.toFixed(3)}, što daje ukupni dobitak brzine oko ${Math.round(totalDv)} m/s. Pritom raketa potroši približno ${fuelFraction.toFixed(1)}% početne mase kao gorivo.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 400);
        
        // Stars
        ctx.fillStyle = "white";
        stars.forEach(s => {
            if(launching) s.x -= (currentDv * 0.01 + 1);
            if(s.x < 0) s.x = 550;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(s.x, s.y, s.s, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

        const vi = parseFloat(viS.value);
        const ratio = parseFloat(ratioS.value);
        const totalDv = vi * Math.log(ratio);
        updateOutputs(totalDv);

        if(launching) {
            progress += 0.01;
            if(progress > 1) progress = 1;
            currentDv = totalDv * progress;
        } else {
            currentDv = 0;
        }

        dvDisplay.innerText = `Δv: ${Math.round(currentDv)} m/s`;

        // Rocket
        const rx = 150, ry = 200;
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(rx, ry);
        
        // Exhaust
        if(launching && progress < 1) {
            for(let i=0; i<20; i++) {
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, ${100+Math.random()*100}, 0, ${Math.random()})`;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(-20 - Math.random()*100, (Math.random()-0.5)*20, Math.random()*10, 0, Math.PI*2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        // Rocket Body
        ctx.fillStyle = "#cbd5e0";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(40, 0); ctx.lineTo(0, -15); ctx.lineTo(-40, -15); ctx.lineTo(-40, 15); ctx.lineTo(0, 15);
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        
        // Fuel Indicator
        ctx.fillStyle = "#38bdf8";
        const fuelWidth = 30 * (1 - progress);
        ctx.fillRect(-35, -10, fuelWidth, 20);

        ctx.restore();
        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    launchBtn.onclick = () => {
        if(launching) { launching = false; progress = 0; }
        else { launching = true; progress = 0; }
    };

    viS.oninput = ratioS.oninput = () => { if(!launching) draw(); };
    draw();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z105 — Sila na prirubnici slavine {.unnumbered}

Volumenski protok vode iznosi 0,07 m$^3$/min kroz djelomično zatvoreni ventil. Unutarnji promjer cijevi na mjestu prirubnice iznosi 20 mm, pri čemu pretlak na tom mjestu iznosi 89,6 kPa. Ukupna masa sustava i vode iznosi 5,8 kg. Potrebno je odrediti ukupnu silu na prirubnici.

**Zadano:** $\dot{V}=0,07\,\text{m}^3/\text{min}$, $d=20\,\text{mm}$, $p_m=89,6\,\text{kPa}$, $m=5,8\,\text{kg}$
**Odrediti:** $\vec{F}$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_1 = v_2 = \frac{0,00117}{\pi \cdot 0,01^2} = \mathbf{3,724 \, \text{m/s}}$.
2. U x-smjeru:
$$
\begin{aligned}
F_{Rx} &= -p_1 A_1 - \beta \dot{m} v_1 \\
&= -40000 \cdot 0,000314 - 1,02 \cdot 1,17 \cdot 3,724 \\
&= \mathbf{-17,0 \, \text{N}}
\end{aligned}
$$
Smjer je suprotan od toka.

3. U z-smjeru:
$$
\begin{aligned}
F_{Rz} &= G + \beta \dot{m} v_2 \\
&= 4,5 \cdot 9,81 + 1,02 \cdot 1,17 \cdot 3,724 \\
&= \mathbf{48,6 \, \text{N}}
\end{aligned}
$$
Sila djeluje naviše.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Sila na prirubnici ventila -->
<div id="z105-valve-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🚰 Dinamika ventila: Sile na prirubnici</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati prirubnicu:</strong> U vodoravnom smjeru tlak i impuls zajedno opterećuju prirubnicu, a u okomitom se impuls zbraja s težinom ventila. Zato reakciju treba uvijek rastaviti po osima prije nego je spojiš u rezultantu.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="z105-canvas" width="550" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Force Decomposition Overlay -->
            <div id="z105-force-box" style="position: absolute; left: 20px; bottom: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 5px;">REAKCIJA PRIRUBNICE:</div>
                <div style="color: #ef4444;">Fx: <b id="z105-fx-val">-17.0 N</b></div>
                <div style="color: #10b981;">Fz: <b id="z105-fz-val">48.6 N</b></div>
                <div style="border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; margin-top: 5px; padding-top: 5px; font-weight: 800; color: #1e293b;">
                    |FR|: <span id="z105-fr-total">51.5</span> N
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Protok Q: <span id="z105-v-vdot" style="color:#2563eb;">1.17</span> L/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z105-vdot-slider" min="0.5" max="5" step="0.1" value="1.17" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Pretlak pm: <span id="z105-v-pm" style="color:#2563eb;">40</span> kPa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z105-pm-slider" min="10" max="150" step="5" value="40" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #f0f9ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #0ea5e9;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #0369a1; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;">Doprinosi sili:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #0c4a6e; line-height: 1.4;">
                    1. <b>Tlak:</b> p₁A₁ gura ventil desno.<br>
                    2. <b>Impuls:</b> Promjena smjera strujanja.<br>
                    3. <b>Težina:</b> G vuče ventil dolje.
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">pA</div>
                    <div id="z105-pa-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">βṁv</div>
                    <div id="z105-mom-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">G</div>
                    <div id="z105-g-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 N</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z105-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z105-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vdotS = document.getElementById('z105-vdot-slider'), pmS = document.getElementById('z105-pm-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random() });

    function update() {
        const vdot_l = parseFloat(vdotS.value), pm_kpa = parseFloat(pmS.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81, d = 0.02, mass = 4.5, beta = 1.02;
        
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const v = (vdot_l / 1000) / A;
        const mdot = rho * (vdot_l / 1000);
        const pm = pm_kpa * 1000;
        const pressureForce = pm * A;
        const momentumForce = beta * mdot * v;
        const weightForce = mass * g;

        // Fx: Sum Fx = mdot(v_out_x - v_in_x) -> FRx + p1A1 = mdot(0 - v)
        const fx = -pressureForce - momentumForce;
        // Fz: Sum Fz = mdot(v_out_z - v_in_z) -> FRz - G = mdot(-v - 0)
        const fz = weightForce + momentumForce;
        const fr = Math.sqrt(fx*fx + fz*fz);

        document.getElementById('z105-v-vdot').innerText = vdot_l.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z105-v-pm').innerText = pm_kpa;
        document.getElementById('z105-fx-val').innerText = fx.toFixed(1) + " N";
        document.getElementById('z105-fz-val').innerText = fz.toFixed(1) + " N";
        document.getElementById('z105-fr-total').innerText = fr.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z105-pa-card').textContent = pressureForce.toFixed(1) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z105-mom-card').textContent = momentumForce.toFixed(1) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z105-g-card').textContent = weightForce.toFixed(1) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z105-explainer').textContent = `Pri protoku ${vdot_l.toFixed(2)} L/s i pretlaku ${pm_kpa.toFixed(0)} kPa tlak daje ${pressureForce.toFixed(1)} N, a impuls skretanja još ${momentumForce.toFixed(1)} N. Zato u x-smjeru dobivaš ${fx.toFixed(1)} N, dok se u z-smjeru težina ${weightForce.toFixed(1)} N zbraja s impulsom do ${fz.toFixed(1)} N.`;

        draw(v, fx, fz);
    }

    function draw(v, fx, fz) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const inletStartX = 50;
        const inletY = 170;
        const elbowCX = 240;
        const elbowCY = 250;
        const radius = 80;
        const outletX = elbowCX + radius;
        const outletBottom = 392;

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 450);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#f8fbff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 550, 450);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i += 1) {
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(24, 40 + i * 44);
            ctx.lineTo(526, 40 + i * 44);
            ctx.stroke();
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.lineWidth = 44;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inletStartX, inletY);
        ctx.lineTo(elbowCX, inletY);
        ctx.arc(elbowCX, elbowCY, radius, -Math.PI / 2, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(outletX, outletBottom);
        ctx.stroke();

        const flowGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(inletStartX, 0, outletX, 0);
        flowGrad.addColorStop(0, '#60a5fa');
        flowGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2563eb');
        ctx.strokeStyle = flowGrad;
        ctx.lineWidth = 14;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inletStartX, inletY);
        ctx.lineTo(elbowCX, inletY);
        ctx.arc(elbowCX, elbowCY, radius, -Math.PI / 2, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(outletX, outletBottom);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillRect(162, 128, 28, 84);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('prirubnica', 136, 118);

        const horizontalLen = elbowCX - inletStartX;
        const arcLen = radius * Math.PI / 2;
        const verticalLen = outletBottom - elbowCY;
        const totalLen = horizontalLen + arcLen + verticalLen;

        particles.forEach((p, idx) => {
            p.t += 0.0048 * v;
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const distance = p.t * totalLen;
            let px;
            let py;
            if (distance <= horizontalLen) {
                px = inletStartX + distance;
                py = inletY + Math.sin(idx) * 2;
            } else if (distance <= horizontalLen + arcLen) {
                const local = (distance - horizontalLen) / arcLen;
                const angle = -Math.PI / 2 + local * (Math.PI / 2);
                px = elbowCX + radius * Math.cos(angle);
                py = elbowCY + radius * Math.sin(angle);
            } else {
                px = outletX + Math.sin(idx * 0.5) * 2;
                py = elbowCY + (distance - horizontalLen - arcLen);
            }
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.45)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(118, 112, 236, 302);
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('kontrolni volumen', 122, 106);

        const startX = 176;
        const startY = inletY;
        const arrowScale = 3.6;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        drawArrow(ctx, startX, startY, startX + fx * arrowScale, startY);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981';
        drawArrow(ctx, startX, startY, startX, startY - fz * arrowScale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#38bdf8';
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        drawArrow(ctx, startX, startY, startX + fx * arrowScale, startY - fz * arrowScale);
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Fx', startX + fx * arrowScale - 18, startY - 10);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981';
        ctx.fillText('Fz', startX + 10, startY - fz * arrowScale - 10);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#38bdf8';
        ctx.fillText('FR', startX + fx * arrowScale + 8, startY - fz * arrowScale - 8);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = ctx.strokeStyle;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    vdotS.oninput = update; pmS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z106 — Konzolni cjevovod - Moment savijanja {.unnumbered}

Podzemnim cjevovodom crpi se voda na određenu visinu, pri čemu unutarnji promjer cjevovoda iznosi 100 mm. Dimenzije cjevovoda prikazane su na slici, a voda se ispušta u okolinu pri atmosferskom tlaku. Brzina istrujavanja iznosi 3 m/s, dok masa horizontalnog dijela cjevovoda napunjenog vodom iznosi 12 kg/m. Cijev je konzolno pričvršćena za tlo. Potrebno je odrediti: a) moment savijanja u točki A, b) potrebnu duljinu horizontalnog dijela cjevovoda tako da moment u točki A bude jednak nuli.

**Zadano:** $d=100\,\text{mm}$, $v=3\,\text{m/s}$, $m'=12\,\text{kg/m}$, $H=2\,\text{m}$, $L=1,5\,\text{m}$ (sa slike)
**Odrediti:** $M_A$, $L$ (za $M_A=0$)

**Rješenje:**
1. $\dot{m} = \rho A v = 1000 \cdot 0,00785 \cdot 5 = \mathbf{39,25 \, \text{kg/s}}$.
2. Težina horizontalnog dijela: $G_L = 15 \cdot 1,5 \cdot 9,81 = 220,7 \, \text{N}$ (djeluje na $L/2$).
3. Moment impulsa: $M_{imp} = \dot{m} v \cdot H = 39,25 \cdot 5 \cdot 2 = 392,5 \, \text{Nm}$.
4. Ukupni moment u A:
$$
\begin{aligned}
M_A &= M_{imp} + G_L \cdot (L/2) \\
&= 392,5 + 220,7 \cdot 0,75 \\
&= \mathbf{558 \, \text{Nm}}
\end{aligned}
$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Konzolna cijev i moment savijanja -->
<div id="z106-cantilever-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🏗️ Konzolni cjevovod: Analiza momenta savijanja</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati moment:</strong> U točki A nema samo jedan uzrok savijanja. Horizontalni impuls toka daje moment <strong>ṁvH</strong>, a težina vodoravnog kraka dodatni moment <strong>GL/2</strong>; tek njihov zbroj daje stvarno opterećenje konzole.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="z106-canvas" width="550" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Moment Meter -->
            <div style="position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 20px; background: #1e293b; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; min-width: 120px;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8;">MOMENT U A</div>
                <div id="z106-ma-val" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #38bdf8;">558 Nm</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Duljina L: <span id="z106-v-L" style="color:#2563eb;">1.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z106-L-slider" min="0.5" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.5" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Brzina v: <span id="z106-v-v" style="color:#2563eb;">5.0</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z106-v-slider" min="1" max="10" step="0.2" value="5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #f97316;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9a3412; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;">Ravnoteža momenata:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #7c2d12; line-height: 1.5;">
                    ΣM_A = M_impuls + M_težina<br>
                    M_imp = ṁvH (gura desno)<br>
                    M_tež = GL(L/2) (vuče dolje)
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">ṁ</div>
                    <div id="z106-mdot-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 kg/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">M_imp</div>
                    <div id="z106-mimp-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0 Nm</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">M_tež</div>
                    <div id="z106-mgrav-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0 Nm</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z106-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z106-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const lS = document.getElementById('z106-L-slider'), vS = document.getElementById('z106-v-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random() });
    const state = { L: 1.5, H: 2.0, v: 5 };

    function recalculate() {
        const L = parseFloat(lS.value), v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const H = 2.0, rho = 1000, d = 0.1, m_lin = 15, g = 9.81;
        
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const mdot = rho * A * v;
        const gl = m_lin * L * g;
        
        const m_imp = mdot * v * H;
        const m_grav = gl * (L / 2);
        const ma = m_imp + m_grav;

        state.L = L;
        state.H = H;
        state.v = v;

        document.getElementById('z106-v-L').innerText = L.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z106-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z106-ma-val').innerText = Math.round(ma) + " Nm";
        document.getElementById('z106-mdot-card').textContent = mdot.toFixed(1) + ' kg/s';
        document.getElementById('z106-mimp-card').textContent = Math.round(m_imp) + ' Nm';
        document.getElementById('z106-mgrav-card').textContent = Math.round(m_grav) + ' Nm';
        document.getElementById('z106-explainer').textContent = `Za L = ${L.toFixed(1)} m i brzinu ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s maseni protok iznosi ${mdot.toFixed(1)} kg/s. Impuls toka zato daje moment ${Math.round(m_imp)} Nm, a težina vodoravnog kraka još ${Math.round(m_grav)} Nm, pa je ukupni moment u A približno ${Math.round(ma)} Nm.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const ox = 120;
        const oy = 392;
        const scale = Math.min((550 - 210) / state.L, (450 - 130) / state.H, 118);
        const topY = oy - state.H * scale;
        const endX = ox + state.L * scale;

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 450);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#f8fafc');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 550, 450);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i += 1) {
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(24, 42 + i * 42);
            ctx.lineTo(526, 42 + i * 42);
            ctx.stroke();
        }

        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.fillRect(ox - 30, oy - 4, 56, 42);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i += 1) {
            ctx.fillRect(ox - 24 + i * 10, oy + 2, 4, 30);
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 18;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, topY);
        ctx.lineTo(endX, topY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.lineWidth = 9;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, topY);
        ctx.lineTo(endX, topY);
        ctx.stroke();

        const verticalLen = state.H * scale;
        const horizontalLen = state.L * scale;
        const totalLen = verticalLen + horizontalLen;
        particles.forEach((p, idx) => {
            p.t += 0.0045 * state.v;
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const distance = p.t * totalLen;
            let px;
            let py;
            if (distance <= verticalLen) {
                px = ox + Math.sin(idx * 0.35) * 2;
                py = oy - distance;
            } else {
                px = ox + (distance - verticalLen);
                py = topY + Math.sin(idx * 0.35) * 2;
            }
            ctx.fillStyle = '#60a5fa';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#38bdf8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(ox, oy, 42, Math.PI, 1.5 * Math.PI);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#38bdf8';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox + 2, oy - 42);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 12, oy - 48);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 12, oy - 36);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        drawArrow(ctx, endX, topY, endX + 70, topY);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('impuls toka', endX - 10, topY - 14);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        const arrowCount = Math.max(2, Math.round(state.L * 2));
        for (let i = 0; i < arrowCount; i += 1) {
            const x = ox + (i + 0.5) * horizontalLen / arrowCount;
            drawArrow(ctx, x, topY - 10, x, topY + 42);
        }
        ctx.fillStyle = '#b45309';
        ctx.fillText('težina kraka', ox + horizontalLen * 0.32, topY + 60);

        ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox - 24, topY);
        ctx.lineTo(ox - 24, oy);
        ctx.moveTo(ox, topY - 24);
        ctx.lineTo(endX, topY - 24);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('A', ox - 15, oy + 26);
        ctx.fillText('H', ox - 42, topY + verticalLen / 2);
        ctx.fillText('L', ox + horizontalLen / 2, topY - 30);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = ctx.strokeStyle;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    lS.oninput = recalculate; vS.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>


```

***

### Zadatak Z107 — Snaga rotirajuće prskalice {.unnumbered}

Prskalica za vodu prenamijenjena je u turbinu za generiranje električne energije postavljanjem rotirajuće glavčine na vratilo generatora, na način prikazan na slici. Volumenski protok vode na ulazu u prskalicu iznosi 20 dm$^3$/s, pri čemu voda istrujava iz prskalice u tangencijalnom smjeru. Broj okretaja prskalice iznosi 300 o/min u horizontalnoj ravnini. Promjer svakog mlaza iznosi 1 cm, a normalna udaljenost između osi rotacije i središta sapnica 0,6 m. Potrebno je odrediti snagu prskalice.

**Zadano:** $\dot{V}=20\,\text{dm}^3/\text{s}$, $n=300\,\text{o/min}$, $d=1\,\text{cm}$, $r=0,6\,\text{m}$
**Odrediti:** $P$

**Rješenje:**
1. Brzine izlaza:
$$
\begin{aligned}
v_{rel} &= 63,66 \, \text{m/s} \\
v_{oboda} &= 18,85 \, \text{m/s} \\
v_{aps} &= 44,81 \, \text{m/s}
\end{aligned}
$$
2. $M = \dot{m} v_{aps} r = \mathbf{537,7 \, \text{Nm}}$.
3. $P = M \omega = \mathbf{16,9 \, \text{kW}}$.

***

### Zadatak Z108 — Komercijalne vjetroturbine {.unnumbered}

Komercijalne vjetroturbine promjera lopatica 100 m generiraju električnu snagu veću od 3 MW u režimu maksimalne učinkovitosti. Za vjetroturbinu promjera lopatica 90 m, pri brzini vjetra 25 km/h i učinkovitosti 32%, potrebno je odrediti generiranu snagu i horizontalnu komponentu sile na stup vjetroturbine. U proračunu se zrak smatra idealnim fluidom gustoće 1,25 kg/m$^3$.

**Zadano:** $D=90\,\text{m}$, $v=25\,\text{km/h}$, $\eta=32\%$, $\rho=1,25\,\text{kg/m}^3$
**Odrediti:** $P$, $F_R$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_1 = 6,94 \, \text{m/s}, \dot{m} = 55223 \, \text{kg/s}$.
2. $P_{max} = 1331 \, \text{kW} \implies P = \mathbf{426 \, \text{kW}}$.
3. $v_2 = v_1 \sqrt{1-0,32} = 5,73 \, \text{m/s}$.
4. $F_R = \dot{m}(v_2 - v_1) = \mathbf{-67,2 \, \text{kN}}$.
***

### Zadatak Z109 — Snaga helikoptera {.unnumbered}

Rasterećeni helikopter mase 10 t lebdi iznad razine mora za vrijeme ukrcaja. U tom režimu elise se vrte brzinom 400 o/min i uzrokuju gibanje zračne mase promjera 15 m prema slobodnoj površini mora srednjom brzinom proporcionalnom broju okretaja. Helikopter se zatim dodatno opterećuje teretom mase 15 t i počinje polagano uzdizati teret. Potrebno je odrediti volumenski protok zraka i potrebnu snagu pri rasterećenom lebdenju, a zatim potrebnu snagu za opterećeno lebdenje i pripadajući broj okretaja lopatica. Gustoća zraka iznosi 1,18 kg/m$^3$.

**Zadano:** $m_1=10\,\text{t}$, $n_1=400\,\text{o/min}$, $D=15\,\text{m}$, $m_2=15\,\text{t}$ (dodatni teret), $\rho=1,18\,\text{kg/m}^3$
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}_1$, $P_1$, $P_2$, $n_2$

**Rješenje:**
1. Prazan: $v = 21,7 \, \text{m/s} \implies P = \mathbf{1064 \, \text{kW}}$.
2. S teretom: $v = 34,3 \, \text{m/s} \implies P = \mathbf{4205 \, \text{kW}}$.

***

### Zadatak Z110 — Brana s razlikom razina - Sila na ustavu {.unnumbered}

Maseni protok vode regulira se pomoću brane, podizanjem ili spuštanjem vertikalne ploče. Uslijed razlike visina stupaca vode pojavljuje se sila na branu, pri čemu srednja brzina strujanja na strani više razine vode iznosi $v_1$, a na strani niže razine $v_2$. Ako je fluid idealan i strujanje stacionarno, potrebno je odrediti izraze za $v_1$ i $v_2$, te iznos sile koja djeluje na branu po jedinici duljine $b$ okomito na sliku.

**Zadano:** $h_1=3\,\text{m}, h_2=0,5\,\text{m}$, idealan fluid, $b=1\,\text{m}$ (širina)
**Odrediti:** $v_1$, $v_2$, $F/b$

**Rješenje:**
1. Bernoulli (1-2) + Kontinuitet: $v_1 h_1 = v_2 h_2$.
2. Brzine: $v_1 = 1,28 \, \text{m/s}, v_2 = 7,68 \, \text{m/s}$.
3. Sila iz zakona količine gibanja:
$$
\begin{aligned}
F &= \frac{1}{2}\rho g b (h_1^2 - h_2^2) + \rho b (h_1 v_1^2 - h_2 v_2^2) \\
&= 85,8 - 20,1 \\
&= \mathbf{65,7 \, \text{kN}}
\end{aligned}
$$

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Brana i Sila (Impuls + Hidrostatika) -->
<div id="z110-gate-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🌊 Sila na ustavu: Hidrostatika vs. Dinamika</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati ustavu:</strong> Razlika dubina ne određuje samo hidrostatsku silu. Kroz kontinuitet dubine određuju i brzine <strong>v₁</strong> i <strong>v₂</strong>, pa dinamički član može smanjiti ukupno opterećenje ustave iako je nizvodni tok mnogo brži.
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="z110-canvas" width="550" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <!-- Force Result Overlay -->
            <div style="position: absolute; right: 20px; top: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px solid #ef4444; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">UKUPNA SILA F</div>
                <div id="z110-force-val" style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #b91c1c;">65.7 kN</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Dubina ispred h₁: <span id="z110-v-h1" style="color:#2563eb;">3.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z110-h1-slider" min="1.5" max="5" step="0.1" value="3" style="width: 100%;">

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Dubina iza h₂: <span id="z110-v-h2" style="color:#2563eb;">0.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z110-h2-slider" min="0.1" max="1.4" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Komponente sile:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Hidrostatska (ΔPh):</span> <b id="z110-res-ph" style="color:#2b6cb0;">85.8 kN</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Dinamička (ΔPi):</span> <b id="z110-res-pi" style="color:#ef4444;">-20.1 kN</b></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₁</div>
                    <div id="z110-v1-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂</div>
                    <div id="z110-v2-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Omjer h₁/h₂</div>
                    <div id="z110-ratio-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z110-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z110-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const h1S = document.getElementById('z110-h1-slider'), h2S = document.getElementById('z110-h2-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<150; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random()*550, y_rel: Math.random() });
    const state = { h1: 3, h2: 0.5, v1: 0, v2: 0 };

    function recalculate() {
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value), h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81, b = 2.0;

        const v1 = Math.sqrt( (2 * g * (h1 - h2)) / (Math.pow(h1/h2, 2) - 1) );
        const v2 = v1 * (h1 / h2);
        const ratio = h1 / h2;
        state.h1 = h1;
        state.h2 = h2;
        state.v1 = v1;
        state.v2 = v2;

        const f_hydro = 0.5 * rho * g * b * (h1*h1 - h2*h2) / 1000; // kN
        const f_dyn = rho * b * (h1 * v1 * v1 - h2 * v2 * v2) / 1000; // kN
        const f_total = f_hydro + f_dyn;

        document.getElementById('z110-v-h1').innerText = h1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z110-v-h2').innerText = h2.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z110-res-ph').innerText = f_hydro.toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('z110-res-pi').innerText = f_dyn.toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('z110-force-val').innerText = f_total.toFixed(1) + " kN";
        document.getElementById('z110-v1-card').textContent = v1.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z110-v2-card').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z110-ratio-card').textContent = ratio.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z110-explainer').textContent = `Za omjer dubina h₁/h₂ = ${ratio.toFixed(2)} uzvodna brzina je ${v1.toFixed(2)} m/s, a nizvodna raste na ${v2.toFixed(2)} m/s. Zato hidrostatski doprinos iznosi ${f_hydro.toFixed(1)} kN, ali dinamički član ${f_dyn.toFixed(1)} kN smanjuje ukupnu silu na ${f_total.toFixed(1)} kN.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const scale = 70, ox = 275, oy = 400;

        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, oy - state.h1*scale, ox, state.h1*scale);
        ctx.fillRect(ox, oy - state.h2*scale, 550-ox, state.h2*scale);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.fillRect(ox - 10, 0, 20, oy - state.h2*scale - 10);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.5)"; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox-10, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox-10-state.h1*20, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox-10, oy-state.h1*scale); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox+10, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox+10+state.h2*20, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox+10, oy-state.h2*scale); ctx.fill();

        particles.forEach(p => {
            const currentV = p.x < ox ? state.v1 : state.v2;
            p.x += currentV * 2; if(p.x > 550) p.x = 0;
            let py;
            if(p.x < ox) py = oy - p.y_rel * state.h1 * scale;
            else py = oy - p.y_rel * state.h2 * scale;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        drawArrow(ctx, ox - 100, oy - state.h1*scale/2, ox - 20, oy - state.h1*scale/2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569"; ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("h1", 28, oy - state.h1*scale + 16);
        ctx.fillText("h2", ox + 26, oy - state.h2*scale + 16);
        ctx.fillText("ustava", ox - 22, 20);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    h1S.oninput = recalculate; h2S.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>


```

***

### Zadatak Z111 — Peltonova turbina {.unnumbered}

Potrebno je dokazati da je snaga proizvedena pomoću Peltonove turbine polumjera $r$, koja rotira konstantnom kutnom brzinom $\omega$, jednaka
$$
P = \rho \cdot \omega \cdot r \cdot \dot{V} \cdot (v - \omega r)(1 - \cos\beta).
$$
Pri tome je $\rho$ gustoća tekućine, a $\dot{V}$ volumenski protok. Za zadane podatke potom treba odrediti numeričku snagu turbine.

**Zadano:** $\rho=1000\,\text{kg/m}^3$, $r=2\,\text{m}$, $\dot{V}=10\,\text{m}^3/\text{s}$, $n=150\,\text{o/min}$, $\beta=160^\circ$, $v=50\,\text{m/s}$
**Odrediti:** $P$

**Rješenje:**
1. $w = r \omega = 31,42 \, \text{m/s}$.
2. Snaga turbine:
$$
\begin{aligned}
P &= 1000 \cdot 0,15 \cdot (50-31,42) \cdot 31,42 \cdot (1 - \cos 160^\circ) \\
&= \mathbf{11,3 \, \text{MW}}
\end{aligned}
$$

***

### Zadatak Z112 — Flyboard dinamika {.unnumbered}

Osoba na Flyboard-u penje se na visinu 10 metara. Četiri sapnice promjera 5 cm, pričvršćene na noge, omogućuju podizanje osobe i sustava Flyboard ukupne mase 150 kg. Potrebno je odrediti minimalnu brzinu mlaza za lebdenje. Ako je brzina mlaza 15 m/s, treba odrediti potrebno vrijeme za postizanje zadane visine i brzinu podizanja. Zatim treba odrediti koliko će se sustav podignuti iznad visine od 10 m ako se dotok vode prekine točno pri dosezanju te visine, te koliko će se vremena osoba zadržati iznad 10 m.

**Zadano:** $H=10\,\text{m}$, $4 \times d=5\,\text{cm}$, $m=150\,\text{kg}$, $v=15\,\text{m/s}$
**Odrediti:** $v_{min}$, $t$, $w$, $\Delta H$, $\Delta t$

**Rješenje:**
1. Za lebdenje ($150 \, \text{kg}$): $v_{min} = \mathbf{13,69 \, \text{m/s}}$.
2. Pri $15 \, \text{m/s}$: $a = \mathbf{1,97 \, \text{m/s}^2}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- Flyboard / Rocket Widget -->
<div id="flyboard-widget" style="max-width: 1040px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #flyboard-widget .fly-shell {
            border-radius: 26px;
            border: 1px solid #cfe1ff;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #eef6ff 0%, #dcecff 100%);
            padding: 28px;
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12);
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: end;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.4vw, 2rem);
            line-height: 1.05;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-subtitle {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.96rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
            max-width: 64ch;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            background: #dbeafe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15);
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-note,
        #flyboard-widget .fly-explainer {
            padding: 16px 18px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-note {
            background: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.42);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1e3a8a;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-stage {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 22px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-stage-head {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-stage-title {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #flyboard-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 260px;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-control,
        #flyboard-widget .fly-status {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-control label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-control span {
            color: #1d4ed8;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-status {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-status small {
            display: block;
            margin-top: 6px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-cards {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-card {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.08);
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-card-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: #64748b;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-card-value {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-physics {
            padding: 16px 18px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            line-height: 1.65;
        }
        #flyboard-widget .fly-physics code {
            display: block;
            margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            white-space: normal;
        }
```
