```{=html}
        #flyboard-widget .fly-explainer {
            margin-top: 16px;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border: 1px solid #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
        }
        @media (max-width: 820px) {
            #flyboard-widget .fly-shell {
                padding: 20px;
            }
            #flyboard-widget .fly-head,
            #flyboard-widget .fly-controls {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="fly-shell">
        <div class="fly-head">
            <div>
                <h3 class="fly-title">Flyboard: prag lebdenja i višak potiska</h3>
                <p class="fly-subtitle">Završni widget sada radi istu stvar kao novi Reynolds blok u vježbi 13: ne prikazuje samo da se sustav miče, nego jasno odvaja tri režima rada. Na jednoj sceni vidiš mlaznice, odnos potiska i težine, te koliko si daleko od praga lebdenja.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="fly-chip" id="fly-mode-chip">Režim rada</div>
        </div>

        <div class="fly-note">
            <strong>Kako čitati flyboard:</strong> Potisak mlaznica raste približno s <strong>v²</strong>, dok je težina gotovo stalna. Zato je ključan prag <strong>v_min</strong> pri kojem vrijedi <strong>F_p = G</strong>: ispod njega sustav tone, oko njega lebdi, a iznad njega prelazi u ubrzano penjanje.
        </div>

        <div class="fly-stage">
            <div class="fly-stage-head">
                <div class="fly-stage-title">Glavna scena ravnoteže sila</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">a = <span id="fly-accel-inline">0.00</span> m/s²</div>
            </div>
            <canvas id="fly-canvas" width="960" height="430"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div class="fly-controls">
            <div class="fly-control">
                <label><span>Brzina mlaza v</span><strong><span id="v-fly-val">15.0</span> m/s</strong></label>
                <input type="range" id="v-fly-slider" min="10" max="30" step="0.5" value="15" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="fly-status" id="fly-status">
                Uzlijeće
                <small>Potisak je veći od težine.</small>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fly-cards">
            <div class="fly-card">
                <div class="fly-card-label">v_min</div>
                <div class="fly-card-value" id="fly-vmin-card">0.00 m/s</div>
            </div>
            <div class="fly-card">
                <div class="fly-card-label">Potisak F_p</div>
                <div class="fly-card-value" id="fly-thrust-card">0 N</div>
            </div>
            <div class="fly-card">
                <div class="fly-card-label">F_p - G</div>
                <div class="fly-card-value" id="fly-net-card">0 N</div>
            </div>
            <div class="fly-card">
                <div class="fly-card-label">Omjer v/v_min</div>
                <div class="fly-card-value" id="fly-ratio-card">0.00</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="fly-physics">
            <strong>Fizika:</strong> Uzgon na flyboardu nastaje iz promjene količine gibanja vode. Kad brzina izlaznog mlaza poraste, potisak raste kvadratno, pa se sustav vrlo brzo prebacuje iz režima tonjenja u lebdenje i zatim u penjanje.
            <code>F_p = ρ A v², &nbsp;&nbsp; v_min = √(G / ρA)</code>
        </div>

        <div class="fly-explainer">
            <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="fly-explainer"></span>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const vS = document.getElementById('v-fly-slider');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('fly-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const status = document.getElementById('fly-status');
    const chip = document.getElementById('fly-mode-chip');

    let personY = 250;
    let vel = 0;
    let phase = 0;

    function computeState() {
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const rho = 1000;
        const mass = 150;
        const g = 9.81;
        const A = 4 * (Math.PI * 0.05 * 0.05 / 4);
        const thrust = rho * A * v * v;
        const weight = mass * g;
        const vMin = Math.sqrt(weight / (rho * A));
        const netForce = thrust - weight;
        const accel = netForce / mass;
        const ratio = v / vMin;
        return { v, thrust, weight, vMin, netForce, accel, ratio };
    }

    function classify(accel) {
        if (accel > 0.25) return { title: 'Penje se', detail: 'Potisak je osjetno veći od težine.', chipBg: '#dcfce7', chipColor: '#166534', statusBg: '#dcfce7' };
        if (accel < -0.25) return { title: 'Tone', detail: 'Mlaz je ispod praga lebdenja.', chipBg: '#fee2e2', chipColor: '#b91c1c', statusBg: '#fee2e2' };
        return { title: 'Lebdi', detail: 'Potisak i težina su gotovo u ravnoteži.', chipBg: '#fef3c7', chipColor: '#92400e', statusBg: '#fef3c7' };
    }

    function updateOutputs(data) {
        const regime = classify(data.accel);
        document.getElementById('v-fly-val').textContent = data.v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('fly-vmin-card').textContent = data.vMin.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('fly-thrust-card').textContent = data.thrust.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('fly-net-card').textContent = data.netForce.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('fly-ratio-card').textContent = data.ratio.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('fly-accel-inline').textContent = data.accel.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('fly-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu mlaza ${data.v.toFixed(1)} m/s potisak iznosi ${data.thrust.toFixed(0)} N, dok je težina sustava ${data.weight.toFixed(0)} N. Prag lebdenja je oko ${data.vMin.toFixed(2)} m/s, pa je trenutna razlika sila ${data.netForce.toFixed(0)} N i ubrzanje ${data.accel.toFixed(2)} m/s².`;

        status.innerHTML = `${regime.title}<small>${regime.detail}</small>`;
        status.style.background = regime.statusBg;
        chip.textContent = regime.title;
        chip.style.background = regime.chipBg;
        chip.style.color = regime.chipColor;
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
        const headlen = 12;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function draw(data) {
        const w = canvas.width;
        const h = canvas.height;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#dbeafe');
        sky.addColorStop(0.55, '#e0f2fe');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#bfdbfe');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.38)';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(180, 84, 90, 26, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(680, 76, 110, 28, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(760, 116, 72, 20, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();

        const waterTop = h - 78;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#38bdf8';
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterTop, w, h - waterTop);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.26)';
        for (let i = 0; i < 16; i += 1) {
            ctx.fillRect(20 + i * 60, waterTop + 16 + Math.sin(phase + i) * 5, 34, 2);
        }

        const hoverLineY = 252;
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.18)';
        ctx.fillRect(70, hoverLineY - 8, 700, 16);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#92400e';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('zona lebdenja  Fp = G', 82, hoverLineY - 14);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(78, 60);
        ctx.lineTo(78, waterTop);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i += 1) {
            const y = 70 + i * 58;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(68, y);
            ctx.lineTo(88, y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText((5 - i).toString(), 48, y + 4);
        }
        ctx.fillText('visina', 38, 48);

        const centerX = 330;
        const jetLen = 92 + data.v * 5.4 + Math.sin(phase) * 8;
        const bodyY = personY;

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.26)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(centerX - 20, bodyY + 22);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 44, bodyY + jetLen);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 18, bodyY + jetLen + 26);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 2, bodyY + 22);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(centerX + 20, bodyY + 22);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX + 44, bodyY + jetLen);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX + 18, bodyY + jetLen + 26);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX + 2, bodyY + 22);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(centerX, bodyY - 52, 18, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.moveTo(centerX, bodyY - 34);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX, bodyY + 2);
        ctx.moveTo(centerX, bodyY - 18);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 24, bodyY - 4);
        ctx.moveTo(centerX, bodyY - 18);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX + 24, bodyY - 4);
        ctx.moveTo(centerX, bodyY + 2);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 16, bodyY + 28);
        ctx.moveTo(centerX, bodyY + 2);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX + 16, bodyY + 28);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillRect(centerX - 34, bodyY + 18, 68, 10);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.fillRect(centerX - 10, bodyY + 12, 20, 6);

        drawArrow(centerX + 80, bodyY + 8, centerX + 80, bodyY - Math.min(120, data.thrust / 22), '#2563eb');
        drawArrow(centerX + 130, bodyY - 10, centerX + 130, bodyY + Math.min(120, data.weight / 18), '#ef4444');
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('F_p', centerX + 90, bodyY - Math.min(120, data.thrust / 22) - 8);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.fillText('G', centerX + 136, bodyY + Math.min(120, data.weight / 18) + 18);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75)';
        ctx.fillRect(770, 60, 130, 230);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v / v_min', 800, 84);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.18)';
        ctx.fillRect(820, 104, 30, 150);
        const fillRatio = Math.min(1.6, data.ratio) / 1.6;
        ctx.fillStyle = data.ratio >= 1 ? '#22c55e' : '#f97316';
        ctx.fillRect(820, 104 + 150 * (1 - fillRatio), 30, 150 * fillRatio);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#facc15';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(808, 104 + 150 * (1 - 1 / 1.6));
        ctx.lineTo(862, 104 + 150 * (1 - 1 / 1.6));
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fef3c7';
        ctx.font = '700 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v_min', 864, 104 + 150 * (1 - 1 / 1.6) + 4);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.fillText(data.ratio.toFixed(2), 815, 280);
    }

    function frame() {
        const data = computeState();
        updateOutputs(data);

        vel -= data.accel * 0.12;
        vel *= Math.abs(data.accel) < 0.08 ? 0.88 : 0.985;
        personY += vel;
        if (personY > 278) { personY = 278; vel = 0; }
        if (personY < 132) { personY = 132; vel = 0; }

        phase += 0.16;
        draw(data);
        requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    }

    frame();
})();
</script>

```
